option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableColumn?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableView?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<BorderPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="tn.esprit.controllers.ReponseController" prefWidth="1650.0" prefHeight="960.0" styleClass="root-pane" stylesheets="@evenement-dashboard.css">
<left> <VBox prefWidth="250.0" minWidth="250.0" maxWidth="250.0" styleClass="sidebar"> <children>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="14.0" styleClass="logo-box"> <children> <StackPane prefWidth="40.0" prefHeight="40.0"> <children> <Label text="❤" styleClass="logo-heart"/> <Label text="✚" styleClass="logo-plus"/> </children> </StackPane> <Label text="MEDFLOW" styleClass="logo-text"/> </children> </HBox>
<Region prefHeight="1.0" maxHeight="1.0" styleClass="sidebar-separator"/>
<Label text="GESTIONS" styleClass="sidebar-section-title"/>
<Button fx:id="reclamationBtn" text="" onAction="#toggleSubmenu" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" maxWidth="Infinity" prefWidth="220.0" contentDisplay="GRAPHIC_ONLY" styleClass="sidebar-item, sidebar-btn">
<graphic> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0" maxWidth="Infinity"> <children> <Label text="" styleClass="sidebar-item-icon"/> <Label text="Réclamations" styleClass="sidebar-item-text"/> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label fx:id="reclamationArrow" text="⌄" styleClass="sidebar-arrow"/> </children> </HBox> </graphic> </Button>
<VBox fx:id="submenuVBox" spacing="18.0" styleClass="submenu-card" managed="false" visible="false" maxWidth="220.0">
<children> <Label text="STATISTIQUES :" styleClass="submenu-title"/>
<Button text=" Statistique Réclamation" onAction="#openReclamationStats" maxWidth="Infinity" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="submenu-link"/> <Label text="BLOG :" styleClass="submenu-title"/>
<Button text=" Posts en attente" onAction="#openPendingPostsAdminPage" maxWidth="Infinity" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="submenu-link"/>
<Button text=" Statistique Blog" onAction="#openBlogStats" maxWidth="Infinity" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="submenu-link"/>
</children> </VBox>
<Region VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/>
<Button text="↪ Déconnexion" onAction="#handleLogout" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" maxWidth="Infinity" prefWidth="220.0" styleClass="sidebar-item, sidebar-btn"/> </children> <padding> <Insets top="24.0" right="18.0" bottom="24.0" left="18.0"/> </padding> </VBox> </left>
<center> <VBox spacing="22.0" styleClass="main-area"> <padding> <Insets top="18.0" right="22.0" bottom="22.0" left="22.0"/> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="20.0" styleClass="hero-card"> <children> <StackPane minWidth="88.0" minHeight="88.0" prefWidth="88.0" prefHeight="88.0" styleClass="hero-icon-box"> <children> <Label text="" styleClass="hero-icon"/> </children> </StackPane>
<VBox spacing="10.0"> <children> <Label text="Gestion des Réponses aux Réclamations" styleClass="hero-title"/> <HBox spacing="14.0" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <children> <Label fx:id="inventoryCountLabel" text="0 réclamation(s) en attente" styleClass="hero-subtitle"/> <Label text=" Admin" styleClass="admin-badge"/> </children> </HBox> </children> </VBox>
<Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
<HBox spacing="16.0" alignment="CENTER_RIGHT"> <children> <Button text=" Voir les Réclamations" styleClass="white-btn"/> </children> </HBox> </children> <padding> <Insets top="30.0" right="30.0" bottom="30.0" left="30.0"/> </padding> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="16.0" styleClass="list-header-card"> <children> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="18.0"> <children> <HBox spacing="12.0" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <children> <Label text="☰" styleClass="list-icon"/> <Label text="Liste des Réclamations" styleClass="list-title"/> </children> </HBox>
<Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <HBox alignment="CENTER_RIGHT" spacing="10.0"> <children> <HBox spacing="8" alignment="CENTER_RIGHT" styleClass="sort-container">
<Label text=" Trier par :" styleClass="sort-label"/>
<ComboBox fx:id="sortCombo" prefWidth="200.0" promptText="Choisir un tri" styleClass="sort-combo"/> </HBox> </children> </HBox>
</children> </HBox>
<TextField fx:id="searchField" promptText="Rechercher..." styleClass="search-main-input"/> </children> <padding> <Insets top="22.0" right="24.0" bottom="22.0" left="24.0"/> </padding> </VBox>
<HBox spacing="24.0"> <children> <VBox spacing="16.0" styleClass="stat-card" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <StackPane prefWidth="46.0" prefHeight="46.0" styleClass="stat-badge blue-badge"> <children> <Label text="" styleClass="stat-emoji"/> </children> </StackPane> <Label fx:id="totalReclamationsLabel" text="0" styleClass="stat-number"/> <Label text="Total Réclamations" styleClass="stat-text"/> </children> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="16.0" styleClass="stat-card" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <StackPane prefWidth="46.0" prefHeight="46.0" styleClass="stat-badge green-badge"> <children> <Label text="✅" styleClass="stat-emoji"/> </children> </StackPane> <Label fx:id="reponduesLabel" text="0" styleClass="stat-number"/> <Label text="Répondues" styleClass="stat-text"/> </children> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="16.0" styleClass="stat-card" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <StackPane prefWidth="46.0" prefHeight="46.0" styleClass="stat-badge red-badge"> <children> <Label text="❌" styleClass="stat-emoji"/> </children> </StackPane> <Label fx:id="nonReponduesLabel" text="0" styleClass="stat-number"/> <Label text="Non Répondues" styleClass="stat-text"/> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="admin-table-card" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS">
<children>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="12.0" styleClass="admin-table-top"> <children> <VBox spacing="3.0"> <children> <Label text="Tableau de traitement" styleClass="admin-table-title"/>
<Label text="Gérez les réclamations, leurs priorités et les réponses admin." styleClass="admin-table-subtitle"/> </children> </VBox>
<Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
<Label text="Back-office" styleClass="admin-table-chip"/> </children> </HBox>
<TableView fx:id="reclamationTable" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS" prefHeight="360.0" minHeight="300.0" styleClass="admin-reclamation-table">
<placeholder> <VBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="8.0"> <children> <Label text="" style="-fx-font-size: 38px;"/> <Label text="Aucune réclamation trouvée" style="-fx-font-size: 16px; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-text-fill: #334155;"/> <Label text="Les réclamations apparaîtront ici." style="-fx-font-size: 13px; -fx-text-fill: #64748b;"/> </children> </VBox> </placeholder>
<columns> <TableColumn fx:id="referenceCol" prefWidth="210.0" minWidth="190.0" text="RÉFÉRENCE"/>
<TableColumn fx:id="typeCol" prefWidth="160.0" minWidth="145.0" text="TYPE"/>
<TableColumn fx:id="statutCol" prefWidth="155.0" minWidth="140.0" text="STATUT"/>
<TableColumn fx:id="prioriteCol" prefWidth="155.0" minWidth="140.0" text="PRIORITÉ"/>
<TableColumn fx:id="descriptionCol" prefWidth="430.0" minWidth="360.0" text="DESCRIPTION"/>
<TableColumn fx:id="actionsCol" prefWidth="230.0" minWidth="210.0" text="ACTIONS"/> </columns> </TableView>
</children>
<padding> <Insets top="18.0" right="18.0" bottom="18.0" left="18.0"/> </padding> </VBox> </VBox> </center> </BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableColumn?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableView?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<BorderPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="tn.esprit.controllers.ReponseController" prefWidth="1650.0" prefHeight="960.0" styleClass="root-pane" stylesheets="@evenement-dashboard.css">
<left> <VBox prefWidth="250.0" minWidth="250.0" maxWidth="250.0" styleClass="sidebar"> <children>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="14.0" styleClass="logo-box"> <children> <StackPane prefWidth="40.0" prefHeight="40.0"> <children> <Label text="❤" styleClass="logo-heart"/> <Label text="✚" styleClass="logo-plus"/> </children> </StackPane> <Label text="MEDFLOW" styleClass="logo-text"/> </children> </HBox>
<Region prefHeight="1.0" maxHeight="1.0" styleClass="sidebar-separator"/>
<Label text="GESTIONS" styleClass="sidebar-section-title"/>
<Button fx:id="reclamationBtn" text="" onAction="#toggleSubmenu" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" maxWidth="Infinity" prefWidth="220.0" contentDisplay="GRAPHIC_ONLY" styleClass="sidebar-item, sidebar-btn">
<graphic> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0" maxWidth="Infinity"> <children> <Label text="" styleClass="sidebar-item-icon"/> <Label text="Réclamations" styleClass="sidebar-item-text"/> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label fx:id="reclamationArrow" text="⌄" styleClass="sidebar-arrow"/> </children> </HBox> </graphic> </Button>
<VBox fx:id="submenuVBox" spacing="18.0" styleClass="submenu-card" managed="false" visible="false" maxWidth="220.0">
<children> <Label text="STATISTIQUES :" styleClass="submenu-title"/>
<Button text=" Statistique Réclamation" onAction="#openReclamationStats" maxWidth="Infinity" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="submenu-link"/> <Label text="BLOG :" styleClass="submenu-title"/>
<Button text=" Posts en attente" onAction="#openPendingPostsAdminPage" maxWidth="Infinity" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="submenu-link"/>
<Button text=" Statistique Blog" onAction="#openBlogStats" maxWidth="Infinity" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="submenu-link"/>
</children> </VBox>
<Region VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/>
<Button text="↪ Déconnexion" onAction="#handleLogout" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" maxWidth="Infinity" prefWidth="220.0" styleClass="sidebar-item, sidebar-btn"/> </children> <padding> <Insets top="24.0" right="18.0" bottom="24.0" left="18.0"/> </padding> </VBox> </left>
<center> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="AS_NEEDED" vbarPolicy="AS_NEEDED" styleClass="main-scroll"> <content> <VBox spacing="22.0" styleClass="main-area"> <padding> <Insets top="18.0" right="22.0" bottom="22.0" left="22.0"/> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="20.0" styleClass="hero-card"> <children> <StackPane minWidth="88.0" minHeight="88.0" prefWidth="88.0" prefHeight="88.0" styleClass="hero-icon-box"> <children> <Label text="" styleClass="hero-icon"/> </children> </StackPane>
<VBox spacing="10.0"> <children> <Label text="Gestion des Réponses aux Réclamations" styleClass="hero-title"/> <HBox spacing="14.0" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <children> <Label fx:id="inventoryCountLabel" text="0 réclamation(s) en attente" styleClass="hero-subtitle"/> <Label text=" Admin" styleClass="admin-badge"/> </children> </HBox> </children> </VBox>
<Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
<HBox spacing="16.0" alignment="CENTER_RIGHT"> <children> <Button text=" Voir les Réclamations" styleClass="white-btn"/> </children> </HBox> </children> <padding> <Insets top="30.0" right="30.0" bottom="30.0" left="30.0"/> </padding> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="16.0" styleClass="list-header-card"> <children> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="18.0"> <children> <HBox spacing="12.0" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <children> <Label text="☰" styleClass="list-icon"/> <Label text="Liste des Réclamations" styleClass="list-title"/> </children> </HBox>
<Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <HBox alignment="CENTER_RIGHT" spacing="10.0"> <children> <HBox spacing="8" alignment="CENTER_RIGHT" styleClass="sort-container">
<Label text=" Trier par :" styleClass="sort-label"/>
<ComboBox fx:id="sortCombo" prefWidth="200.0" promptText="Choisir un tri" styleClass="sort-combo"/> </HBox> </children> </HBox>
</children> </HBox>
<TextField fx:id="searchField" promptText="Rechercher..." styleClass="search-main-input"/> </children> <padding> <Insets top="22.0" right="24.0" bottom="22.0" left="24.0"/> </padding> </VBox>
<HBox spacing="24.0"> <children> <VBox spacing="16.0" styleClass="stat-card" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <StackPane prefWidth="46.0" prefHeight="46.0" styleClass="stat-badge blue-badge"> <children> <Label text="" styleClass="stat-emoji"/> </children> </StackPane> <Label fx:id="totalReclamationsLabel" text="0" styleClass="stat-number"/> <Label text="Total Réclamations" styleClass="stat-text"/> </children> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="16.0" styleClass="stat-card" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <StackPane prefWidth="46.0" prefHeight="46.0" styleClass="stat-badge green-badge"> <children> <Label text="✅" styleClass="stat-emoji"/> </children> </StackPane> <Label fx:id="reponduesLabel" text="0" styleClass="stat-number"/> <Label text="Répondues" styleClass="stat-text"/> </children> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="16.0" styleClass="stat-card" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <StackPane prefWidth="46.0" prefHeight="46.0" styleClass="stat-badge red-badge"> <children> <Label text="❌" styleClass="stat-emoji"/> </children> </StackPane> <Label fx:id="nonReponduesLabel" text="0" styleClass="stat-number"/> <Label text="Non Répondues" styleClass="stat-text"/> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="admin-table-card" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS">
<children>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="12.0" styleClass="admin-table-top"> <children> <VBox spacing="3.0"> <children> <Label text="Tableau de traitement" styleClass="admin-table-title"/>
<Label text="Gérez les réclamations, leurs priorités et les réponses admin." styleClass="admin-table-subtitle"/> </children> </VBox>
<Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
<Label text="Back-office" styleClass="admin-table-chip"/> </children> </HBox>
<TableView fx:id="reclamationTable" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS" prefHeight="460.0" minHeight="420.0" styleClass="admin-reclamation-table">
<placeholder> <VBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="8.0"> <children> <Label text="" style="-fx-font-size: 38px;"/> <Label text="Aucune réclamation trouvée" style="-fx-font-size: 16px; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-text-fill: #334155;"/> <Label text="Les réclamations apparaîtront ici." style="-fx-font-size: 13px; -fx-text-fill: #64748b;"/> </children> </VBox> </placeholder>
<columns> <TableColumn fx:id="referenceCol" prefWidth="210.0" minWidth="190.0" text="RÉFÉRENCE"/>
<TableColumn fx:id="typeCol" prefWidth="160.0" minWidth="145.0" text="TYPE"/>
<TableColumn fx:id="statutCol" prefWidth="155.0" minWidth="140.0" text="STATUT"/>
<TableColumn fx:id="prioriteCol" prefWidth="155.0" minWidth="140.0" text="PRIORITÉ"/>
<TableColumn fx:id="descriptionCol" prefWidth="430.0" minWidth="360.0" text="DESCRIPTION"/>
<TableColumn fx:id="actionsCol" prefWidth="230.0" minWidth="210.0" text="ACTIONS"/> </columns> </TableView>
</children>
<padding> <Insets top="18.0" right="18.0" bottom="18.0" left="18.0"/> </padding> </VBox> </VBox> </content> </ScrollPane> </center> </BorderPane>
